title: Not my future? Core values and the neural representation of future events.

assets.abstract: Individuals with pronounced self-transcendence values have been shown to put greater weight on the long-term consequences of their actions when making decisions. Using functional magnetic resonance imaging, we investigated the neural mechanisms underlying the evaluation of events occurring several decades in the future as well as the role of core values in these processes. Thirty-six participants viewed a series of events, consisting of potential consequences of climate change, which could occur

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Self-transcendence — mystical experience, cosmic consciousness, awe, numinous in neuroscience.
